H

H - Variable in class com.pax.poslink.ManageRequest
Deprecated. 
HALOPerCardType - Variable in class com.pax.poslink.ManageRequest
Once this amount per trans is reached it will not accept any SAF record.
HALOPerCardType - Variable in class com.pax.poslink.ManageResponse
Once this amount per trans is reached it will not accept any SAF record.
handleInputAccount(FullIntegrationBase.CurrentStepCallback, InputAccount.CardEventListener) - Method in class com.pax.poslink.fullIntegration.InputAccount
Together with InputAccount.InputAccountCallback.onInputAccountStart()
You must call this right after InputAccount.InputAccountCallback.onInputAccountStart() to receive input result.
handleInputCardNum(String, FullIntegrationBase.CurrentStepCallback) - Method in class com.pax.poslink.fullIntegration.InputAccount
Together with InputAccount.InputAccountCallback.onInputAccountStart()
You may call this to replace InputAccount.handleInputAccount(com.pax.poslink.fullIntegration.FullIntegrationBase.CurrentStepCallback, com.pax.poslink.fullIntegration.InputAccount.CardEventListener) after InputAccount.InputAccountCallback.onInputAccountStart().
handleInputCardNum(String, InputAccount.InputCardNumCallback) - Method in class com.pax.poslink.fullIntegration.InputAccount
Together with InputAccount.InputAccountCallback.onInputAccountStart()
You may call this to replace InputAccount.handleInputAccount(com.pax.poslink.fullIntegration.FullIntegrationBase.CurrentStepCallback, com.pax.poslink.fullIntegration.InputAccount.CardEventListener) after InputAccount.InputAccountCallback.onInputAccountStart().
handleInputCVV(String, FullIntegrationBase.CurrentStepCallback) - Method in class com.pax.poslink.fullIntegration.InputAccount
Together with InputAccount.InputAccountCallback.onEnterCVV()
You must call this after InputAccount.InputAccountCallback.onEnterCVV() to send input result.
handleInputExpiry(String, FullIntegrationBase.CurrentStepCallback) - Method in class com.pax.poslink.fullIntegration.InputAccount
Together with InputAccount.InputAccountCallback.onEnterExpiryDate()
handleInputPinStart(AuthorizeCard.EnterPinCallBack, FullIntegrationBase.CurrentStepCallback) - Method in class com.pax.poslink.fullIntegration.AuthorizeCard
Together with AuthorizeCard.AuthorizeCallback.onEnterPinStart() You must call this after AuthorizeCard.AuthorizeCallback.onEnterPinStart().
handleInputPinStart(GetPINBlock.EnterPinCallBack, FullIntegrationBase.CurrentStepCallback) - Method in class com.pax.poslink.fullIntegration.GetPINBlock
Together with GetPINBlock.GetPINBlockCallback.onEnterPinStart() You must call this after GetPINBlock.GetPINBlockCallback.onEnterPinStart().
handleInputZip(String, FullIntegrationBase.CurrentStepCallback) - Method in class com.pax.poslink.fullIntegration.InputAccount
Together with InputAccount.InputAccountCallback.onEnterZip()
You must call this after InputAccount.InputAccountCallback.onEnterZip() to send input result.
handleNotSupportState(Context, String) - Method in class com.pax.poslink.fullIntegration.FullIntegrationBase
 
handleProcessing(InputAccount.ProcessingMessageUpdateCallback, FullIntegrationBase.CurrentStepCallback) - Method in class com.pax.poslink.fullIntegration.InputAccount
Together with InputAccount.InputAccountCallback.onProcessing(java.lang.String, java.lang.String)
Used to receive processing finished or not.
handleSelectEMVApp(String, FullIntegrationBase.CurrentStepCallback) - Method in class com.pax.poslink.fullIntegration.InputAccount
Together with InputAccount.InputAccountCallback.onSelectEMVApp(List)
Select EMV App when doing EMV process.
handleSelectLanguage(FullIntegrationBase.CurrentStepCallback) - Method in class com.pax.poslink.fullIntegration.InputAccount
Together with InputAccount.InputAccountCallbackCompat.onSelectLanguage(String)
Select Language.
handleWarnRemoveCard(FullIntegrationBase.CurrentStepCallback) - Method in class com.pax.poslink.fullIntegration.InputAccount
Together with InputAccount.InputAccountCallback.onWarnRemoveCard() You must call this after InputAccount.InputAccountCallback.onWarnRemoveCard().
handleWarnRemoveCard(FullIntegrationBase.CurrentStepCallback) - Method in class com.pax.poslink.fullIntegration.RemoveCard
Together with RemoveCard.RemoveCardCallback.onWarnRemoveCard() You must call this after RemoveCard.RemoveCardCallback.onWarnRemoveCard().
HardKeyList - Variable in class com.pax.poslink.ManageRequest
Hard keys separated by , like "KEY0 KEY1".
HardwareConfigurationBitmap - Variable in class com.pax.poslink.ManageResponse
Determines what hardware is supported on the device.
hasPermission(Context) - Static method in class com.pax.poslink.usb.UsbUtil
Check whether the app has permission for the USB device.
hasPermission(Context, UsbDevice) - Static method in class com.pax.poslink.usb.UsbUtil
Check whether the app has permission for the USB device.
hasTech(int) - Method in class com.pax.poslink.peripheries.tech.CardInfo
Returns whether the card has the specified tech.

Input area height
hideInputArea() - Method in class com.pax.poslink.fullIntegration.InputAccount
Together with InputAccount.sendInputArea(int, int, int, int)
Hide the input area.
HIGHER_TWO_LAYER_THERMAL - Static variable in interface com.pax.poslink.peripheries.POSLinkPrinter.GreyLevel
Two-layer thermal printing, higher gray level than 3
HIGHEST_PERCENTAGE - Static variable in interface com.pax.poslink.peripheries.POSLinkPrinter.GreyLevel
[50~500] -Gray level is set according to percentage of default value.
hint - Variable in class com.pax.poslink.fullIntegration.InputAccount.InputAreaParams
hint message.
HK25 - Static variable in interface com.pax.poslink.peripheries.ScanCodeFormat

Returned by the host, last 4 digits of account number for transaction.
HostAccount - Variable in class com.pax.poslink.ReportResponse
Returned by the host, last 4 digits of account number for transaction.

Returned by the host, the card type used in the transaction.

Returned by the host, the card type used in the transaction.

HostDetailedMessage - Variable in class com.pax.poslink.PaymentResponse
Additional detailed message or code returned from the host
HostDetailedMessage - Variable in class com.pax.poslink.ReportResponse
Additional detailed message or code returned from the host
HostEchoData - Variable in class com.pax.poslink.entity.TransInfo
Host raw response message.
HostGateWay - Variable in class com.pax.poslink.PaymentRequest
HostGateWay Information.
HostGateWay() - Constructor for class com.pax.poslink.PaymentRequest.HostGateWay
 
HostProgramType - Variable in class com.pax.poslink.entity.CardInfo
Program specified by the host, specified for CREDIT trans.
HostReferenceNumber - Variable in class com.pax.poslink.TORResponseInfo
The transaction reference number is returned from a host.
The host can be a processor(terminal -> gateway -> processor) or another gateway(terminal -> gateway -> another gateway ->…->processor).
HostResponse - Variable in class com.pax.poslink.BatchResponse
Payment processing host response
HostResponse - Variable in class com.pax.poslink.PaymentResponse
Payment processing host response.
HostResponse - Variable in class com.pax.poslink.ReportResponse
Payment processing host response.
HostResponseCode - Variable in class com.pax.poslink.MerchantTotals
Host returned the result code, if declined display host error on the ECR’s screen.
HostResponseCode - Variable in class com.pax.poslink.TORResponseInfo
Host/gateway response code
HostResponseMessage - Variable in class com.pax.poslink.MerchantTotals
Host returned error message.
HostResponseMessage - Variable in class com.pax.poslink.TORResponseInfo
Host/gateway response Message
HostSettledAmount - Variable in class com.pax.poslink.BatchResponse
Total amount for all supported EDCs excluding Credit Void and Credit Auth transactions returned in host message.
HostSettledAmount - Variable in class com.pax.poslink.MerchantTotals
Total amount for all supported EDCs excluding Credit Void and Credit Auth transactions returned in host message.
HostSettledCount - Variable in class com.pax.poslink.BatchResponse
Total Count for all supported EDCs excluding Credit Void and Credit Auth transactions returned in host message.
HostSettledCount - Variable in class com.pax.poslink.MerchantTotals
Total Count for all supported EDCs excluding Credit Void and Credit Auth transactions returned in host message.
HostSettledReturnAmount - Variable in class com.pax.poslink.BatchResponse
Total return amount for all supported EDCs excluding Credit Void and Credit Auth transactions returned in the host message.
HostSettledReturnAmount - Variable in class com.pax.poslink.MerchantTotals
Total return amount for all supported EDCs excluding Credit Void and Credit Auth transactions returned in the host message.
HostSettledReturnCount - Variable in class com.pax.poslink.BatchResponse
Return count for all supported EDCs excluding Credit Void and Credit Auth transactions returned in the host message.
HostSettledReturnCount - Variable in class com.pax.poslink.MerchantTotals
Return count for all supported EDCs excluding Credit Void and Credit Auth transactions returned in the host message.

Returned by the host, the unique ID assigned to a terminal.
